name: Pumpkin Seeds
shortDescription: Premium pumpkin seeds for topping, snacking, salad bowls, and everyday pantry variety.
description: Agree Superfoods Pumpkin Seeds are a versatile everyday seed for topping, snacking, and adding crunch to simple meals.
fullDescription: Pumpkin seeds bring colour, crunch, and modern pantry appeal to the Agree Superfoods range. They are easy to use in salads, breakfast bowls, trail mixes, and snack jars, which makes them both practical and visually appealing.
The product is presented as a premium seed choice for people who want pantry variety without complexity. The page focuses on simple food use, clean presentation, and repeatable everyday habits.
benefits: Adds crunch and texture to meals and snacks
Works well in bowls, salads, mixes, and pantry jars
Helps the range feel modern, visual, and snack friendly
usageIdeas: Sprinkle over breakfast bowls, salads, or soups
Use in trail mixes, seed blends, or snack jars
Add to granola, crackers, or baking recipes for extra crunch
bestFor: Households looking for a topping-friendly seed option
Retail selections centred on premium healthy snacking
Customers who enjoy texture-rich pantry ingredients

productDetails.label: Storage
productDetails.value: Store sealed in a cool, dry pantry

highlights.description: Adds freshness and visual variety to the seeds collection.

faqs.question: How are pumpkin seeds commonly used?
faqs.answer: They are often used in salads, breakfast bowls, seed mixes, snack jars, and simple baking recipes.

faqs.question: Are pumpkin seeds more for snacking or topping?
faqs.answer: They work well for both, which is part of what makes them such a flexible pantry ingredient.
